fields.question: Give a brief explanation of your current job role.
fields.answer: At Bomgar, Brent Goodman schedules, budgets, and coordinates all North American Marketing Events while assisting in Bomgar’s partner marketing program. Since graduating with a degree in Integrated Marketing and Communications from the University of Mississippi, Brent has managed events throughout the country for a major automobile manufacture and now for Bomgar since the spring of 2016. Brent currently resides in Atlanta Georgia.

name: JB
biography:
Justin Brock is the Manager of Digital Marketing for BeyondTrust (formerly Bomgar). He joined in 2004 and held a variety of roles as the company grew from a small startup, through multiple acquisitions, to a recognized market leader.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinbrock/

name: JR
biography: *role="presentation"**aria-labelledby="redactor-voice-0"*

name: MM
biography: Matt Miller is a Content Marketing Manager at BeyondTrust. Prior to BeyondTrust, he developed and executed marketing strategies on cyber security and cloud technologies in roles at Accelerite (a business unit of Persistent Systems), WatchGuard Technologies, and Microsoft. Earlier in his career Matt held various roles in IR, marketing, and corporate communications in the biotech / biopharmaceutical industry. His experience and interests traverse cyber security, cloud / virtualization, IoT, economics, information governance, and risk management. He is also an avid homebrewer (working toward his Black Belt in beer) and writer.

fields.question: Give a brief explanation of your role
fields.answer: At Bomgar, Stacy is focused on knowing our customers, and how our products can help meet the needs of their business roles.  A member of the product management team, Stacy has both deep product knowledge as well as marketing expertise that helps Bomgar connect with our customers, on their terms.  Stacy is constantly learning about our industry, customers, competitors – anything and everything related to secure access, remote support, and security.  She has been with Bomgar since January 2016 and has over 15 years of B2B marketing experience.  She has a Bachelor of Business degree from Indiana University-Bloomington, and an MBA from the Goizueta Business School at Emory University.
